column1: Mesopotamia: Baal → Merged with Hadad (storm god), later Adad in Assyria.
Egypt: Linked to Seth during Hyksos period (16th c. BCE).
Greece: Baal Zaphon → Zeus Kasios; Baal Shamem → Zeus Ouranios.
Rome: Baal Hammon → Saturn; Baal ʾAddir → Hercules.
Baal-Marqod (Lord of the Dance): Phoenician, attested in Lebanon (Sanchuniathon).
Baal-Qarnaim (Lord of Two Horns): Punic, Sicily (CIS I.135).

Zohar (13th cent., Spain) – Kabbalistic angelic hierarchies.
De Coelesti Hierarchia (Pseudo-Dionysius, 5th cent.) – 9 choirs of angels.
Liber Juratus – Angelic seals for protection.
